name: Dragon Attack Mythologies: A Night Wolf Revenge
short_description: Jump, dodge, and fight against anyone who crosses your path in search of revenge. Explore 8 challenging worlds filled with danger and classic arcade action.
detailed_description: Jump, dodge, and fight on a journey of revenge. Play as Sal, a fearless member of the Night Wolves, determined to find Skarlet, who has apparently been kidnapped by the ruthless biker gang, the Scorpions. Punch your way through 8 challenging worlds, facing relentless enemies, deadly traps, and hidden dangers. Only your skill and determination will lead you to the truth in this intense classic arcade action adventure.
about_the_game: Jump, dodge, and fight on a journey of revenge. Play as Sal, a fearless member of the Night Wolves, determined to find Skarlet, who has apparently been kidnapped by the ruthless biker gang, the Scorpions. Punch your way through 8 challenging worlds, facing relentless enemies, deadly traps, and hidden dangers. Only your skill and determination will lead you to the truth in this intense classic arcade action adventure.
supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Latin America, Portuguese - Brazil
